query:
-- 1. Get Rata Maravillada reservation data
SELECT r.id, r.product_name, r.booking_date, r.people, r.amount_paid, r.amount_total, 
       r.customer_name, r.customer_email, r.customer_phone, r.merchant_order,
       q.id as quote_id, q.quote_number, q.subtotal, q.total, q.items_json
FROM reservations r
JOIN quotes q ON q.id = (
  SELECT id FROM quotes WHERE lead_id = (
    SELECT id FROM leads WHERE name LIKE '%Rata Maravillada%' LIMIT 1
  ) LIMIT 1
)
WHERE r.customer_name LIKE '%Rata Maravillada%'
LIMIT 1;
